SEARCH

Package minum

package minum
Minum is a web library with all the components needed to build a web application, include a web server and a database.
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    minum.database
    These are the utilties needed to enable a database for the application.
    minum.exceptions
    Custom exceptions
    minum.htmlparsing
    provides the ability to convert HTML text into an object tree
    minum.logging
    Utilities for logging status of the system at runtime
    minum.security
    Protects against a harsh internet environment
    minum.templating
    templating abilities, mostly for html but useful for any situation requiring quick substitution inside text.
    minum.testing
    Automated software testing
    minum.utils
    Generally-useful utilities.
    minum.web
    Code and data for HTTP serving
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    Config
    If the user has no configuration file, this class contains code that will run to assist them.
    Constants
    Very important system design decisions are made here.
    Context
     
    FullSystem
    This class is responsible for kicking off the entire system.
